login.subtitle_login: Enter your Master Password to unlock encrypted snippets.
login.subtitle_register: Creating a new Zero-Knowledge encrypted identity.
login.register_password_hint: Use at least 8 characters. A longer master password is easier to remember safely and provides better protection for your encrypted local data.
login.conflict_desc: An account with this username already exists on the server. Choose an action:
login.register_success: Registration completed. You can now log in on this device.
login.error_register_failed: Registration failed. Please review the account information and try again.
login.error_auth_failed: Login failed. Please verify the account, password, and server settings.
login.error_login_invalid_credentials: Username or password is incorrect. Please check the account credentials and try again.
login.error_server_unreachable: The server could not be reached. Please check the server address and network connection, then try again.
login.error_register_password_too_short: Master password is too short. Use at least 8 characters so the account can derive and protect your local encryption key properly.
login.error_register_username_too_short: Username is too short. Use at least 3 characters so the account can be created successfully.
login.error_register_user_exists: This username already exists on the server. You can log in, rename the local account, or choose a different username.
login.error_register_invalid_payload: The registration request is incomplete or invalid. Please review the entered information and try again.
login.error_rename_failed: Failed to rename the local account: {{detail}}
login.error_override_failed: Failed to override the remote account: {{detail}}
login.error_conflict_resolve_failed: Failed to complete sync conflict resolution: {{detail}}
login.rename_success: Local account renamed successfully. You can now initialize again.
login.placeholder_password_hint: A clue to help you remember your password
login.password_hint_warning: Do not include the actual password in the hint.
login.error_account_disabled: This account has been disabled. Please contact the administrator.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: System configuration & preferences.
settings.engine_desc: Enable global keyboard hooks for automatic text expansion.
settings.sync_desc: Securely synchronize clipboard across your connected devices.
settings.theme_dark_desc: Default frosted glassmorphism, profound and futuristic
settings.theme_linear_desc: Ultra-clean, high contrast, pure black with 1px borders
settings.theme_macos_desc: Rounded cards and soft ambient shadows
settings.theme_neon_desc: Cyberpunk hacker vibes, deep blues and cyan glows
settings.theme_light_desc: Clean and bright for daytime use
settings.debug_mode_desc: Show non-routine debugging entry points, including dual-instance startup, FlowHint runtime diagnostics, FlowSync sync diagnostics, and advanced sync maintenance actions.
settings.backup_desc: Export or import your configuration data.
settings.flowprobe_backup_desc: By default, only FlowProbe configuration is backed up. When enabled, the export package also includes an encrypted FlowProbe key backup.
settings.error_remote_account_required: This advanced sync maintenance feature requires a connected remote account with a remembered password.
settings.error_export_failed: Failed to export the configuration backup: {{detail}}
settings.error_import_failed: Failed to import the configuration backup: {{detail}}
settings.error_open_file_failed: Failed to open the selected file or folder: {{detail}}
settings.error_cache_dir_change_failed: Failed to change the cache directory: {{detail}}
settings.error_cache_max_size_failed: Failed to update the cache size limit: {{detail}}
settings.error_autostart_failed: Failed to update the startup setting: {{detail}}
settings.error_device_fingerprint_reset_failed: Failed to reset the device fingerprint: {{detail}}
settings.error_flowprobe_backup_failed: Failed to update the FlowProbe backup policy: {{detail}}

snippets.title: FlowSnap
snippets.subtitle: Custom text expansion — type a keyword, get full text instantly.

flowhint.title: FlowHint
flowhint.subtitle: Dictionary-powered smart completion — type a few letters, it reads your mind.
flowhint.empty: No dictionaries loaded. Try creating a custom one or enable a built-in dictionary.

flowrules.title: FlowRules
flowrules.subtitle: Per-app fine-grained control for every feature module.
flowrules.no_rules: No app-specific rules. All apps follow the default policy.

flowdeck.title: FlowDeck
flowdeck.subtitle: System overview: runtime mode, sync status, local feature state, and device summary
flowdeck.summary_mode_local_note: No remote server is used in this mode, so sync is inactive.
flowdeck.summary_mode_remote_note: This account is configured for remote login, auth, and config sync.
flowdeck.summary_server_unused_note: The server is not used while running locally.
flowdeck.detail_local_mode: Remote sync is not enabled; server checks, device discovery, and remote config sync are skipped.
flowdeck.summary_server_unconfigured: No usable server configuration is available
flowdeck.detail_server_unconfigured: The app is missing a server address or account identity, so it cannot run a remote status check.
flowdeck.detail_checking: The app is contacting the server and collecting the latest sync state.
flowdeck.summary_auth_required: Local credentials are missing, so automatic checks are unavailable
flowdeck.detail_auth_required: The app does not have the required local password or token. This prevents automatic remote checks, but does not prove the server is unreachable.
flowdeck.summary_server_unreachable: The server could not be reached
flowdeck.detail_server_unreachable: The app could not reach the remote sync server. Check the server address, network path, and service status, then retry.
flowdeck.detail_auth_invalid_credentials: The saved account or password is no longer valid for remote sync. Update the credentials and sign in again.
flowdeck.summary_api_error: The server responded, but the check did not pass
flowdeck.detail_api_error: The remote sync check returned an unexpected response. Review the server state and retry.
flowdeck.summary_sync_ok: Server reachable and sync status looks healthy
flowdeck.detail_sync_ok: The latest remote manifest check succeeded. Remote blocks: {{blocks}}; remote updated at: {{updatedAt}}.
flowdeck.feature_flowsnap_desc: Snippet expansion, controlled by the default FlowRules policy.
flowdeck.feature_flowhint_desc: Dictionary completion backed by the currently loaded dictionaries.
flowdeck.feature_flowkeys_desc: Keyboard remapping based on the active key profile set.
flowdeck.feature_flowsync_desc: Clipboard sync, enabled or disabled by the default ruleset.
flowdeck.meta_not_loaded: State has not been loaded yet
flowdeck.meta_remote_required: Requires a remote account and discovered target devices
flowdeck.no_devices: No device records are currently available.

sync.title: FlowSync
sync.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted clipboard sync for securely sharing copied content across signed-in devices
sync.hub_connected_desc: Login, auth, and config sync are available
sync.no_activity_message: No sync activity yet. Try copying something!
sync.clear_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard sync records? This cannot be undone.
sync.test_mode_desc_on: This instance has stopped monitoring the local clipboard and now only receives remote sync events. Use it as the secondary instance when testing FlowSync on one machine.
sync.test_mode_desc_off: This instance is actively monitoring the local clipboard and records local copy events normally. When diagnosing two instances on one machine, you can temporarily stop monitoring in Diagnostics and keep only remote sync reception.
sync.diagnostics_desc: Use this to confirm whether the current window is really the new build and which device identity and data directory it is actually using.

flowprobe_sources.title: FlowProbe Sources
flowprobe_sources.subtitle: Manage upstream API assets, connectivity checks, and available models.
flowprobe_sources.phase_banner: Phase 1 completed the navigation split. The next phase will build the list, detail, and verification workflow here.

flowprobe_relay.title: FlowProbe Relay
flowprobe_relay.subtitle: Manage local compatible endpoints, current relay targets, and IDE access.
flowprobe_relay.phase_banner: Phase 1 completed the navigation split. The next phase will build the status strip, dual relay cards, and activity area here.

flowmind.title: FlowMind
flowmind.subtitle: Snap: type a keyword to expand into full text instantly; Hint: smart dictionary completion that reads your mind

flowinfo.title: FlowInfo
flowinfo.subtitle: Everything about YiboFlow
flowinfo.hero_desc: Cross-device encrypted clipboard sync & smart input enhancement

flowkeys.title: FlowKeys
flowkeys.subtitle: Keyboard key remapping — press source, get target
flowkeys.subtitle_extended: The keyboard now works as both a scheme overview and a direct editor. Drag from a source key to a target key to draft a mapping, and the page will stack vertically before allowing any horizontal overflow.
flowkeys.editor_subtitle: Pick a source key, then a target key. You can also switch pick modes and edit directly on the keyboard diagram by clicking or dragging.
flowkeys.profile_section_subtitle: Keep multiple mapping schemes, toggle them on demand, and reflect the current scheme directly on the keyboard diagram.
flowkeys.mapping_section_subtitle: Click a mapping to load it into the editor. Clicking a key on the keyboard will also highlight related mappings here.
flowkeys.summary_clean: No issues need attention right now
flowkeys.empty: No key mappings yet. Click 'Add Mapping' to get started.
flowkeys.source_label: Source Key (press your keyboard to capture)
flowkeys.target_label: Target Key (select from the keyboard below)
flowkeys.source_card_hint: Press a physical key or click the keyboard diagram below to pick the source.
flowkeys.target_card_hint: Click the keyboard diagram below to pick the target.
flowkeys.conflict_warning: This source key is already mapped. Delete it first or choose another key.
flowkeys.conflict_source_duplicate: This source key is already occupied by another mapping in the current profile.
flowkeys.conflict_reverse_duplicate: When bidirectional mode is enabled, the target key also becomes a source key, and that slot is already in use.
flowkeys.conflict_target_source: The target key is also used as a source key by another enabled mapping, which may cause chain-like behavior.
flowkeys.conflict_noop: Source and target are identical and no extra modifiers are applied, so this mapping will not change behavior.
flowkeys.conflict_bidirectional_modifiers: Reverse rules created by bidirectional mode do not carry target-side modifiers. Please confirm that this is intended.
flowkeys.drag_hint: Hold a source key and drag it onto a target key to draft a mapping

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: User management and device management for administrators.
admin.confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"? All associated data will be permanently removed.
admin.confirm_kick_device: Are you sure you want to kick device "{{deviceName}}"? The session will be terminated immediately.
admin.reset_password_warning: You are resetting the password for user "{{username}}". The user will need to log in again with the new password.
admin.e2ee_warning: This system uses end-to-end encryption. Resetting the password will make all previously synced data unrecoverable. The user must reconfigure from their client device.
admin.new_password_hint_placeholder: A clue to help remember the password
